svg.title: <size:18>Book My Show - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)</size>

g.text: Book My Show - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)
Trace: "User selects city, browses movies, picks theatre+show, selects seats, books with payment, gets booking confirmation."
STEP 2 - Who is booking? What movie?
is in a City, has multiple Screens.
has Seats and Shows organized by date.
A theatre like 'INOX Bangalore' has Screen 1
"Show links a Movie to a Screen at a date/time.
of truth for which seats are available."
No two users can book the same seat."
If payment FAILED, seats are RELEASED
back to AVAILABLE. If SUCCESS, seats
-> create Booking, store in map, return
all movies showing in Bangalore today.
which theatres are showing this movie?
"Data indexed by City for fast lookup.
user picks 10am show -> selects seats [1,2,3] -> BookingController
acquires mutex locks, validates AVAILABLE, marks LOCKED -> payment
processed -> SUCCESS -> confirmSeats() marks BOOKED -> Booking
User and Movie — simple domain objects
Show owns seatStatusMap + mutex locks per seat
Booking ties User + Show + Seats + Payment
